purpose: Reference scrape per brief Step 4 — borrow full-bleed hero drama, dark-section rhythm, bold typographic hierarchy, generous whitespace on dark surfaces

borrowed: Generous vertical whitespace on dark / muted surfaces (e.g. Community Impact section)
Bold typographic hierarchy with large display headlines vs small uppercase eyebrows
Full-bleed hero with single dramatic statement
Single-purpose CTA buttons with restrained styling
rejected: SpaceX cold-blue + black palette — replaced with warm forest-green + honey-amber to match the sanctuary's tone (per brief: 'Avoid: any cold palette, corporate minimalism that loses warmth')
Hard-edged 0px border radius — replaced with rounded 16-24px radii for warmth
Tech-startup energy — replaced with quiet, contemplative motion (Ken Burns + butterfly bursts)
